# Omni

Omni is an AI study app that turns documents, web content, and audio into quizzes, flashcards, summaries, and insights.

Site: https://omnistudy.site/

## Key pages
- Landing page: https://omnistudy.site/
- Privacy Policy: https://omnistudy.site/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://omnistudy.site/terms.html
- Support: https://omnistudy.site/support.html
- PDF to Quiz: https://omnistudy.site/pdf-to-quiz.html
- Audio to Notes: https://omnistudy.site/audio-to-notes.html
- Lecture Transcription: https://omnistudy.site/lecture-transcription.html
- Screenshot Showcase: https://omnistudy.site/showcase.html

## Notes
- Privacy-first product messaging.
- iOS App Store listing: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6758739891
- Android Play Store listing: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.suraj.apps.Doc2Quiz
